data.name: 露露卡和大魔導士的色情陷阱地下城！ ～追尋古代的大秘寶～
data.detailed_description:
簡介

操作露露卡，挑戰充滿著色色的陷阱和魔物的地下城吧！
不過請多加小心。
『淫亂度 』一旦太高，她就會把寶物忘的一乾二淨，完全成為快感的俘虜喔。

是征服地下城，獲得傳說中的秘寶？還是沉溺在快感中，墮落下去……唯有你自身能夠選擇！
穿越充滿謎團的情色陷阱地下城，輕鬆明快色情滿載的RPG！

故事

「將此寶物託付予心靈真正純潔的少女。」

留下這句話後大魔導士便去世了。爲了尋求大魔導士的秘寶，露露卡開始了冒險。
然而這一夜致富的寶藏，卻被藏匿在了大魔導士自己建設的色情陷阱地下城中？！

和怪物你追我逃，解開色情的謎題，然後有時去賣春……
在這男性禁入的地下城中，一面遭遇種種色情事件，一面向最深處挺近的露露卡。

她究竟能否漂亮地攻略這座地下城，解開大魔導士色狼龍的財寶的謎團呢？！

特徵

  • 共45張！豐富的高品質情色CG。
  • 和各種怪物H，多種不同的色情事件滿點，種類豐富的性描寫。
  • 以解謎和怪物追逐戰為核心的單純的遊戲系統。
  • 根據『淫亂度 』變化的故事發展。

data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/8.1/10/11(64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo 2.0GHz or more
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Integrated Sound Chip
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Ruruka and the Grand Sorcerer's Erotic Trap Dungeon
data.detailed_description:
Overview

Delve into a fantasy dungeon rife with traps and hidden secrets in this eros rich RPG! Play as Ruruka as she braves the dangers of ravenous beasts, magical traps, and sexually compromising pitfalls armed only with boundless determination and a hunger for treasure!

But beware! If her "Lewdness Level" gets too high, she might forget about the treasure all together and allow herself to drown in erotic pleasure...Will her quest to attain hidden treasure build her sexual endurance enough to resist temptation? The choice is yours!

Story

"I entrust my treasure to a maiden with a truly pure heart."
These were the last words of a Great Sorcerer, but the beginning of rookie adventurer Ruruka-chan's new epic journey. The spell weaver's eulogy was a proposition to all maidens to brave his heavily guarded dungeon and uncover the great fortune deep within its peril ridden walls.

Only pure maidens may enter, but few will reach the end with their chastity intact...
Can this lovely rookie adventurer successfully conquer this dungeon and uncover the secrets of the Great Sorcerer's treasure!?

Features

  • 45 high quality Erotic CG illustrations in total
  • Wide variety of erotic and humorous interactions with fantasy beasts, humanoids, and objects
  • Simple RPG style game system including items, side missions, and post game content
  • Dynamic encounters with traps and enemies that each change depending on "lewdness level"
  • Multiple endings

data.short_description: Conquer the erotic dungeon and guard your chastity against its many perilous pleasures...Guide the pure maiden Ruruka on her CG rich RPG quest to attain the sorcerer's guarded fortune!
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7/8/8.1/10/11(64bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo 2.0GHz or more
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • Storage: 400 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Integrated Sound Chip
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
